step_rationale: Protease inhibitor expressed in plaque SMC; acute-MI exosomal marker and thrombus predictor.
mechanism: Serine-protease inhibitor produced in atherosclerotic plaques and released in exosomes, predicting coronary thrombosis and acute MI.

references.title: Proteomics-based biomarkers of plasma exosomes from patients with acute myocardial infarction.
Translatome profiling reveals Itih4 as a novel smooth muscle cell-specific gene in atherosclerosis.
ITIH4 is a predictor for coronary thrombus in coronary arteriography patients.
